functions.label: fromStoredRuntimeFields
description:
Convert stored runtime fields (from saved objects / DataViewSpec) to AsCodeRuntimeField[].

Merges three separate DataViewSpec maps into a single, self-contained representation per field:
- Composite fields (`type === 'composite'`): subfields are inlined under `fields[]`, each
  looked up by the fully-qualified `parent.child` key in `fieldFormats` and `fieldAttrs`.
- Primitive fields: type, script, format, and attrs are all written to the top-level object.
signature: | undefined) => (Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; name: string; }> | Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; } & { type: "composite"; name: string; fields: Readonly<{ format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; name: string; }>[]; }>)[]

children.label: runtimeFields
description: Map of field name → `{ type, script }` from DataViewSpec

children.label: fieldFormats
description: Map of field name → display format `{ id, params }` from DataViewSpec

children.label: fieldAttrs
description: Map of field name → `{ customLabel, customDescription }` from DataViewSpec

returnComment: Array of AsCodeRuntimeField objects, one per entry in `runtimeFields`

functions.label: toStoredFieldAttributes
description:
Convert AsCodeRuntimeField[] to the `fieldAttrs` entry of a DataViewSpec.

Only fields that declare `custom_label` or `custom_description` produce an entry.
Composite subfields are written under the fully-qualified `parent.child` key.
signature: (runtimeFields: (Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; name: string; }> | Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; } & { type: "composite"; name: string; fields: Readonly<{ format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; name: string; }>[]; }>)[]) =>

children.label: runtimeFields
description: Array of as-code runtime field definitions
signature: (Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; name: string; }> | Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; } & { type: "composite"; name: string; fields: Readonly<{ format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; name: string; }>[]; }>)[]

returnComment: A `fieldAttrs` object suitable for use in a DataViewSpec

functions.label: toStoredFieldFormats
description:
Convert AsCodeRuntimeField[] to the `fieldFormats` entry of a DataViewSpec.

Only fields that declare a `format` are included. Composite subfields are written
under the fully-qualified `parent.child` key.
signature: (runtimeFields: (Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; name: string; }> | Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; } & { type: "composite"; name: string; fields: Readonly<{ format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; name: string; }>[]; }>)[]) => Record<string,

description: Array of as-code runtime field definitions
signature: (Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; name: string; }> | Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; } & { type: "composite"; name: string; fields: Readonly<{ format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; name: string; }>[]; }>)[]

returnComment: A `fieldFormats` object suitable for use in a DataViewSpec

functions.label: toStoredRuntimeFields
description:
Convert AsCodeRuntimeField[] to the `runtimeFieldMap` entry of a DataViewSpec.

Composite fields are expanded into a `fields` record keyed by subfield name.
Script source strings are wrapped in the `{ source }` shape expected by the stored format.
signature: (runtimeFields: (Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; name: string; }> | Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; } & { type: "composite"; name: string; fields: Readonly<{ format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; name: string; }>[]; }>)[]) => Record<string,
